task_completion.description: Access the ADAudit Plus web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus interface, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Set the Alert Profile name and description
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the alert configuration screen or list, the alert name is exactly 'ADAudit Configuration Monitor' and the description is 'Alert on changes to auditing configuration'.

task_completion.description: Configure the alert to track ADAudit Plus configuration changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The alert profile's selected events or category show 'Configuration History', 'All Configuration Changes', 'ADAudit Plus Audit', 'Technician Audit', or 'Administrative Audit'.

task_completion.description: Set the alert severity to Critical
task_completion.visual_evidence: The severity dropdown or indicator for the alert profile is set to 'Critical'.
The alert message field contains a variable representing the technician/user (e.g., %technician_name%, %caller_user_name%, or similar) immediately followed by the text 'modified configuration'.

task_completion.description: Save and enable the alert profile
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ADAudit Configuration Monitor' alert is visible in the system's list of alert profiles and its status indicates it is enabled (e.g., a green checkmark or toggle switch turned on).

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to configure the alert
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ADAudit Plus web interface forms and menus, not just terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the correct local application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the URL http://localhost:8081.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the configuration using browser developer tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface looks like a genuine rendering of ADAudit Plus without browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to modify the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is ManageEngine ADAudit Plus running at http://localhost:8081. The alert profile must be named 'ADAudit Configuration Monitor' with 'Critical' severity. Acceptable categories for tracking ADAudit Plus changes include 'ADAudit Plus Audit', 'Technician Audit', or 'Administrative Audit'.
